section_name: Commission to Adopt Standards and Requirements
text:
The commission shall:

(1) adopt standards for emissions-related inspection criteria consistent with requirements of the United States and the conservation commission applicable to a county in which a program is established under this subchapter; and

(2) develop and impose requirements necessary to ensure that a passing vehicle inspection report is not issued to a vehicle subject to a program established under this subchapter and that information stating that a vehicle has passed an inspection is not submitted to the department’s database unless the vehicle has passed a motor vehicle emissions inspection at a facility authorized and certified by the department.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.302 — Commission to Adopt Standards and Requirements

The commission shall:

    (1) adopt standards for emissions-related inspection criteria consistent with requirements of the United States and the conservation commission applicable to a county in which a program is established under this subchapter; and

    (2) develop and impose requirements necessary to ensure that a passing vehicle inspection report is not issued to a vehicle subject to a program established under this subchapter and that information stating that a vehicle has passed an inspection is not submitted to the department’s database unless the vehicle has passed a motor vehicle emissions inspection at a facility authorized and certified by the department.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1291 (H.B.2305), Sec. 32, eff. March 1, 2015.*

subsections.text: adopt standards for emissions-related inspection criteria consistent with requirements of the United States and the conservation commission applicable to a county in which a program is established under this subchapter; and

develop and impose requirements necessary to ensure that a passing vehicle inspection report is not issued to a vehicle subject to a program established under this subchapter and that information stating that a vehicle has passed an inspection is not submitted to the department’s database unless the vehicle has passed a motor vehicle emissions inspection at a facility authorized and certified by the department.
